name: image-uploader
description: Image uploader with multiple provider support

scripts.build: pnpm run build:config:prod && pnpm run build:app && pnpm run build:server && pnpm run build:worker
scripts.build:dev: pnpm run build:config:dev && pnpm run build:app && pnpm run build:server
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:dev && concurrently -k -n config,app,server,node "esbuild src/config.dev.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/config.js --platform=browser --watch=forever" "esbuild src/app.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/app.js --platform=browser --watch=forever" "esbuild src/server.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/server.js --platform=node --format=esm --watch=forever" "node --watch --env-file=.env dist/server.js"
scripts.deploy: pnpm run build && pnpm wrangler deploy
